name: Port bone wands page
description: Port the legacy Bone Wands tab as routes/bone-wands.tsx. Load NoitaData with React Query, show a selectable bone wand table, and render the selected wand's stats, sprite, always-casts, and spell slots using renderer-loadable asset URLs. Done when nav is enabled, routes are regenerated, and verification passes.
result: Ported the legacy Bone Wands tab as routes/bone-wands.tsx. It uses React Query to load NoitaData, lists bone wand files by filename/modified date, renders selected wand stats, wand sprite, always-casts, and spell slots with noita-asset images, enables navigation, and regenerates routes.

name: Add renderer asset protocol
description: Implement renderer-loadable Noita asset URLs using a custom Electron protocol and return spell image URLs from the backend. Done when the renderer can use actual src values for spell assets, CSP allows the scheme, quickref uses the URLs, and validation passes.
result: Implemented renderer-loadable Noita asset URLs via the noita-asset Electron protocol, enriched spell data with image URLs, updated quickref to render real images, and validated the change set.

name: Build bone wands route and table
description: Add routes/bone-wands.tsx with useQuery(noitaData.load), a left table listing bone wand filename and modified date, single selection, loading/error/empty states.
result: Added routes/bone-wands.tsx with React Query noitaData.load(), a selectable filename/modified table, and loading/error/empty states.

name: Build saves table with backup listing
description:
Core saves page component in routes/index.tsx.

Approach:
- Call window.noitaUtil.saves.listBackups() on mount to fetch BackupEntry[]
- Render results in a Table (table.tsx) with 3 columns:
  - name: the zip filename
  - modified: formatted date (yyyy-MM-dd hh:mm:ss a)
  - size: human-readable file size (KB/MB/GB)
- Sort by lastModified descending (newest first, matching legacy)
- Support multi-row selection (checkboxes or shift/ctrl+click)
- Empty state when no backups exist

IPC types: BackupEntry { name, path, size, lastModified }

Done when: table renders backup list from IPC, supports selection, sorts correctly.
result: Replaced routes/index.tsx stub with the default saves page. It loads backups via IPC, sorts newest-first, renders name/modified/size columns, supports multi-row selection, and handles loading/empty states.

name: Create salakieli route and layout
description: Add routes/salakieli.tsx with a horizontal resizable split pane. Left panel lists decrypted file keys, right panel displays selected decrypted text in a read-only viewer. Include loading, empty, and error states.
result: Added routes/salakieli.tsx with decryptAll loading, selectable file list, horizontal resizable split pane, read-only text viewer, and loading/empty/error feedback.

name: Add renderer route tests
description: Introduce focused renderer tests for the ported routes and key UI flows so page regressions are covered beyond typecheck/lint/build.

name: Expand asset protocol coverage
description: Verify that future Noita asset categories needed by the renderer resolve cleanly through noita-asset and extend the protocol rules if additional safe prefixes or file types are required.

name: Persist splitters and quickref table state
description: Wire salakieliSplitterPosition, qrefSplitterPosition, and spellTableColumnWidths into the renderer so layout/table state survives restarts like the legacy app.

name: Build settings UI
description: Add a renderer settings flow for editing noitaSaveFolder, noitaBackupFolder, noitaExeFile, memoryUseWarningMb, and memoryUseEverySec using the existing config load/save IPC.
result: Implemented settings UI at /settings with config load/save, native folder/file picker IPC, header navigation, and route generation. Verified with bun run typecheck, bun run lint, and bun run test.

name: Use spell image URLs in quickref
description: Update quickref table/details to render actual spell images when URLs exist, falling back gracefully when they do not.
result: Quickref now renders real spell images when URL fields exist, falling back to the compact placeholder otherwise. The details pane also shows an image preview.

name: Build backup toolbar actions (CRUD)
description:
Toolbar with action buttons for save management. Lives above or alongside the saves table.

Actions:
1. Create Backup - Opens a Dialog with:
   - Name input field (default: save_YYYY_MM_DD_HH_mm)
   - Calls saves.createBackup(name) on confirm
   - Toast on success/error, refresh table

2. Restore Backup - Requires exactly 1 row selected:
   - AlertDialog: 'Backup first?' with Yes/No/Cancel
   - Yes: calls saves.createBackup() then saves.restoreBackup(name)
   - No: calls saves.restoreBackup(name, false)
   - Cancel: dismiss
   - Toast on success/error, refresh table

3. Delete Backups - Requires 1+ rows selected:
   - AlertDialog: 'Delete N backup(s)?' confirmation
   - Calls saves.deleteBackups(names)
   - Toast on success/error, refresh table

4. Refresh - Re-fetches the backup list (no dialog)

Components: Button (with icons from lucide-react), Dialog, AlertDialog, Input

Done when: all 4 actions work, proper validation (selection required), toasts for feedback.
result: Added saves toolbar actions for backup creation, restore confirmation with backup-first choice, delete confirmation, refresh, and toast feedback.

name: Add perks to quickref
description: Expose the already-loaded perks data in the quickref area so the reference UI covers both spells and perks.

name: Build activity log dialog
description:
Modal dialog showing backup/restore/delete history.

Approach:
- Triggered by a 'Log' button in the toolbar
- Opens a Dialog component
- Calls window.noitaUtil.activityLog.list() to fetch ActivityList
- Renders a Table with 3 columns:
  - date: formatted timestamp
  - action: BACKUP | RESTORE | DELETE
  - filename: the backup file name
- Sorted newest-first
- Read-only, dismiss with close button

Types: ActivityList { activities: Activity[] }, Activity { date, type, name }

Done when: log dialog opens, displays activity history, dismisses cleanly.
result: Added activity log dialog launched from the saves toolbar. It loads activityLog.list() and displays date/action/filename rows.

name: Verify bone wands page
description: Run typecheck, lint, tests, and build. Complete parent once validation passes.
result: Validated bone wands page: typecheck, lint, tests, and production build all pass.

name: Verify perk and wand asset URLs
description: Run typecheck, lint, tests, and build after the URL enrichment changes. Complete the parent task when validation passes.
result: Validated perk and wand asset URL enrichment: typecheck, lint, tests, and production build all pass.

name: Verify quickref page
description: Run typecheck, lint, tests, and build. Complete parent when all verification passes.
result: Validated quickref implementation: typecheck, lint, tests, and production build pass.

name: Finish renderer parity and app setup
description: Track the remaining work after porting saves, salakieli, quickref, bone wands, and the noita-asset image pipeline. This covers app configuration, run seed flow, onboarding/error handling, UI state persistence, missing quickref coverage, renderer tests, and remaining polish.

name: Enrich noita-data perks and wands with URLs
description: Update noita-data service to derive noita-asset URLs for perk icons and wand sprite files while preserving existing path fields.
result: Updated noita-data to enrich parsed perks and wand sprites with noita-asset URLs while preserving existing ui_icon, perk_icon, and spriteFile path fields.

name: Port saves page to routes/index.tsx
description:
Port the legacy Saves tab as the default landing page. The saves page is a table of backup zip files with CRUD toolbar actions (create, restore, delete, refresh) and an activity log dialog.

Requirements:
- Saves page lives at routes/index.tsx (default route)
- Table with 3 columns: name, modified date, size (human-readable)
- Multi-row selection support
- Toolbar: Create Backup, Restore Backup, Delete Backups, Refresh
- Create Backup dialog with name input (default: save_YYYY_MM_DD_HH_mm)
- Restore Backup with 'Backup first?' confirmation (Yes/No/Cancel)
- Delete Backups with confirmation dialog
- Activity Log dialog (modal with history table)
- All IPC wired through window.noitaUtil.saves.*

Done when: saves page renders as the landing page, all CRUD operations work end-to-end, activity log dialog is functional.
result: Ported the legacy Saves tab as the default route in routes/index.tsx. Added the root app shell, memory footer, saves table, backup create/restore/delete/refresh actions, activity log dialog, ThemeProvider setup, title fix, and removed stale RSC directives. Typecheck and lint pass.

name: Port quickref spells page
description: Port the legacy Quickref tab as routes/quickref.tsx. First pass focuses on the spells sub-tab: load NoitaData with React Query, provide search filtering, show a spell table, and display selected spell details in a right-side pane. Done when the quickref nav item is enabled, spells can be searched/selected, detail fields render, and verification passes.
result: Ported the Quickref spells page at routes/quickref.tsx. It uses React Query for noitaData.load(), supports deferred search over spell fields, renders a single-select spell table, displays legacy spell details, enables quickref navigation, and regenerated routes. Image rendering is deferred because backend currently exposes only game path strings.

name: Register and secure noita-asset protocol
description: Add a privileged Electron protocol handler that maps allowed Noita asset paths to filesystem files, validates roots/extensions, and serves image bytes.
result: Registered a privileged noita-asset Electron protocol, validated allowed asset prefixes/extensions, resolved paths relative to the Noita install dir, served image bytes, and updated renderer CSP to allow the scheme.

name: Polish bone wand presentation
description: Improve the bone wands page toward legacy fidelity with better slot layout, stat presentation, and overall readability while keeping the current functional rendering.

name: Wire quickref navigation and regenerate routes
description: Enable quickref in __root.tsx and run bun run generate-routes.
result: Enabled quickref in root navigation and regenerated routeTree.gen.ts.

name: Wire up memory monitor in root layout status bar
description:
Add a status bar to the root layout that displays Noita process memory usage.

Approach:
- Add a footer/status bar div at the bottom of __root.tsx
- On mount, call noitaProcess.startMemoryMonitor()
- Subscribe via noitaProcess.onMemoryStatus(callback) to receive MemoryStatus updates
- Display: 'noita memory: X.XX Mb' or 'looking for noita process...'
- Clean up: call stopMemoryMonitor() and unsubscribe on unmount

Types: MemoryStatus { running, memoryMb, threshold, exceeded }

Done when: status bar shows memory info when Noita is running, shows 'looking for noita process...' otherwise.
result: Added root status bar and memory monitor integration using getMemoryStatus, startMemoryMonitor, onMemoryStatus subscription, and stop cleanup.

name: Wire bone wands navigation
description: Enable bone wands in __root.tsx and regenerate TanStack routes.
result: Enabled bone wands navigation and regenerated routeTree.gen.ts.

name: Return spell image URLs from noita-data
description: Extend shared spell types and noita-data service to return renderer-loadable URLs for spell sprite fields and uiImageFilename where possible.
result: Extended Spell with spriteUrl, spriteUnidentifiedUrl, and uiImageUrl fields. noita-data now enriches spells and wand spell copies with renderer-loadable noita-asset URLs.

name: Build quickref route and spell table
description: Add routes/quickref.tsx. Use useQuery for window.noitaUtil.noitaData.load(). Add a search input, filter spells by id/name/description/english_name/english_desc, render a single-select table with image placeholder/path, id, name, and description columns. Include loading/empty/error states.
result: Added routes/quickref.tsx using React Query for noitaData.load(), a search input with deferred filtering, and a single-select spell table with img placeholder/path tooltip, id, name, and description columns plus loading/error/empty states.

name: Build spell detail pane
description: Add right-side details panel for selected spell. Render the legacy spell fields: id, names/descriptions, type, spawn_level, spawn_probability, price, mana, max_uses, boolean flags, action lines, sprite paths, related projectiles/entities, custom XML, flags, sound_loop_tag, uiImageFilename.
result: Added the right-side spell detail pane with all legacy fields plus action lines in a scrollable pre block.

name: Research quickref data and image feasibility
description: Inspect noita-data service and shared Spell fields to determine whether spell sprite images are directly displayable in the renderer. Decide whether first pass should render image paths, placeholders, or actual images.
result: NoitaData exposes spell.sprite, spell.sprite_unidentified, and uiImageFilename as game data path strings only. There is no renderer image-serving IPC or asset protocol yet, so the first quickref pass will show a placeholder/image path indicator in the table and render sprite paths in details rather than attempting direct image loading.

name: Extend asset URLs to perks and wands
description: Add renderer-loadable noita-asset URLs for perk icons and wand sprites, enrich the noita-data payload, and validate the change. Done when perk and wand types expose URL fields and verification passes.
result: Extended the noita-asset URL pattern to perks and bone wand sprites by enriching the shared types and noita-data payload, with full validation passing.

name: Add run seed UI
description: Expose the existing noitaProcess.runSeed backend through a small renderer dialog/action that accepts a seed, validates input, and persists the last seed in config.
result: Added a run seed action to the saves toolbar with a dialog prefilled from config.lastSeed, integer validation, a TanStack useMutation call to noitaProcess.runSeed, success/error toasts, and config refetch after launch. Verified with bun run typecheck.

name: Fix foundational scaffolding issues
description:
Prerequisites before building any feature UI:
- Fix index.html title from 'Electron' to 'noita-util'
- Add ThemeProvider from next-themes wrapping the app (currently useTheme() in Toaster has no provider)
- Remove stale 'use client' directives from sonner.tsx and dialog.tsx (no RSC in this project)

Done when: title shows correctly, dark mode theme works, no RSC directives remain.
result: Fixed initial scaffolding: index.html title now uses noita-util, ThemeProvider wraps RouterProvider, and stale use client directives were removed from dialog/sonner.

name: Wire salakieli navigation
description: Enable the salakieli nav item in __root.tsx and regenerate TanStack routes via bun run generate-routes.
result: Enabled salakieli in the root nav and regenerated routeTree.gen.ts with bun run generate-routes.

name: Handle missing config paths and onboarding
description: Detect path/config failures in the renderer and route the user into settings instead of leaving backend errors unstructured. Cover first-run and broken-path scenarios.

name: Verify salakieli page
description: Run typecheck, lint, tests, and build after implementation. Complete the parent task only once validation passes.
result: Validated salakieli implementation: typecheck, lint, tests, and production build all pass.

name: Add perk and wand asset URL fields
description: Extend shared Perk and Wand types with renderer-loadable URL fields for their image paths.
result: Extended shared Perk and Wand types with uiIconUrl, perkIconUrl, and spriteFileUrl so renderer-loadable asset URLs are available alongside raw asset paths.

name: Port salakieli page
description: Port the legacy Salakieli tab as the next feature page. It should live at routes/salakieli.tsx and use a horizontal split pane: file list on the left, decrypted text viewer on the right. Load data via window.noitaUtil.salakieli.decryptAll(). Done when the page is reachable from nav, decrypts files, supports file selection, and displays read-only decrypted content.
result: Ported the Salakieli tab as routes/salakieli.tsx. The route decrypts files with window.noitaUtil.salakieli.decryptAll(), shows a selectable file list in a resizable left pane, displays read-only decrypted content in the right pane, and is enabled in navigation. Routes were regenerated and verification passed.

name: Build wand detail panel
description: Render selected wand details on the right: wand sprite, shuffle, spells/cast, cast delay, recharge time, mana max, mana charge speed, capacity, spread, always-casts, and spell slots with spell images.
result: Added the selected wand detail panel with wand sprite preview, stats, always-casts, and spell slots using noita-asset image URLs.

name: Build app shell layout with tab navigation
description:
Replace the empty nav placeholder in __root.tsx with proper tab-style navigation.

Approach:
- Use the existing Tabs component (tabs.tsx) for navigation
- Link tabs to TanStack Router routes: saves (index), salakieli, quickref, bone wands
- Seed runner and settings can be toolbar buttons/dialogs rather than tabs (matching legacy UX)
- Add a status bar area at the bottom of the layout for the memory monitor
- Use the app's existing layout primitives (Separator instead of raw <hr/>)

Done when: root layout has working tab navigation, clicking tabs navigates between routes.
result: Added root app shell with tab-style navigation, separator, main outlet area, and memory status footer. Placeholder tabs for unported features are disabled until their routes exist.

name: Verify asset protocol
description: Run typecheck, lint, tests, and build after implementation. Complete the parent task when validation passes.
result: Validated asset protocol implementation: typecheck, lint, tests, and production build all pass.
